title: Custom Health Bar
description: Fork of Colorful Health Bar for 1.7.10
body:
This is a fork of Colorful Health Bar for 1.7.10

 

This mod allows you to change the color of the default minecraft health bar as well as the subsequent layers.

This mod will override any other mods that do custom rendering of the health bar such as mantle.

The absorption bar color is also customizable.

![health_bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/246a6487144e0a4b8dd7d94820ba4786cbc0cc43.webp)

Official 1.12.2+ Colorful Health Bar links Curseforge - Github
